---
title: "Taha Ziad"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: Resume
      href: resume.pdf
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/taha-ziad
    - icon: headphones
      text: SoundCloud
      href: https://soundcloud.com/ztaha
    - icon: camera
      text: VSCO
      href: https://vsco.co/tahaziad/gallery
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:taha.ziad.business@gmail.com
---

A lot of my personal projects involve games. To me, the most important thing you can do with math is humanize people. In practice, that often means tackling problems without clear solutions to optimize harmony with our lives.
